name: Neil Swainson
abstract: Neil James Sinclair Swainson (born November 15, 1955) is a Canadian jazz bassist. Swainson started his career in Victoria, British Columbia, when he supported visiting American musicians such as  Herb Ellis, Barney Kessell, and Sonny Stitt.

about_quotes.speaker: Hal Galper
about_quotes.evidence: George is on the tour with Neil Swainson playing bass. So I always try to close circles, you know. So I took advantage of that and I said... 'George,' I went up and I told him...
